Gold_Ore.description: Gold ore returned from the depths of Icarus.
Gold_Ore.flavorText: In the future, Icarus\'s natural wealth offers many intriguing possibilities.

Glass.description: Despite its imperfections, a workable sheet of glass.
Glass.flavorText: Reflected in a sheet of glass is a simple fact: What looks familiar, is in fact a crystalline lattice unlike anything on Earth.

Gunpowder.description: Creating and solving problems for over one thousand years.
Gunpowder.flavorText: \'Not the best we could do, but not the worst either\' - Sol Berlinski

Ghillie_Head.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Head.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Chest.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Chest.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Feet.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Feet.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Arms.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Arms.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Ghillie_Legs.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Ghillie_Legs.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Glass_Bottle_Beer.flavorText: Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.

Glass_Bottle_Wine.flavorText: Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.

Glass_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Glass_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Glass_Wall.description: A fully transparent, mullioned wall section.
Glass_Wall.flavorText: Throw no stones, but hold \'R\' to cycle through variants, such as doorways. Mysteriously, can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Glass_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Glass_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Glass_Wall_Angle.description: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Glass_Ramp.description: A transparent roof piece or ramp.
Glass_Ramp.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Roof_Corner.description: A transparent insert for angled roofs.

Glassworking_Bench.description: Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.
Glassworking_Bench.flavorText: True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.

Glassworking_Bench_V2.description: Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.
Glassworking_Bench_V2.flavorText: True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.

Glass_Jar.description: A roughly made, but perfectly serviceable mason jar.
Glass_Jar.flavorText: This jar is empty, but like the many gaps in our understanding of this planet, is waiting to be filled.

Survey_Radar.description: A portable microwave GPR system with a laser networking feature.
Survey_Radar.flavorText: The original UDA terraformers used seismic surveys, but these provoked local fauna. Ground-penetrating radar has proven less antagonizing, though still not without risk.

Cooked_Pumpkin.flavorText: The pumpkins natural beta-carotene improves endurance.

WildTea.description: Gorse flowers, can be turned into a warming drink.
WildTea.flavorText: Whether invited or not, gorse followed humanity to Icarus.

Thermos_WildTea.description: A slightly bitter, warming beverage that reduces thirst.

Mining_Backpack.description: A reinforced backpack that greatly reduces the weight of ore and wood carried.
Mining_Backpack.flavorText: For long-distance hauling and concerted construction pushes, the triple-layer leatherwork and heavy framing greatly reduces burdens.

Speed_Fertilizer.description: Helps your crops to grow faster

Mission_Delivery_Crystal.flavorText: This crystal seems to be a perfect candidate for large scale map resonance

Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Gold from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Fish_15.description: An extremely rare specimen found only in the Styx Region. Native to Icarus. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_15.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_18.description: An uncommon, saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_18.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Gold_Ore_Lure.description: A luxurious lure carefully crafted out of gold, to attract more fish.
Gold_Ore_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Gorse_Flower_Lure.description: A delicate lure carefully crafted out of flowers, to attract more fish.
Gorse_Flower_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Gold_Wire.description: This wire can be used in Electrical Circuits

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Gold.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Burst_Gold.description: A gorgeous cluster geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Burst_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Gold.description: A gorgeous monolith geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Grilled_Saltwater_Fillet.description: Recently filleted fish grilled over an open fire.

Grilled_Freshwater_Fillet.description: Recently filleted fish grilled over an open fire.

Painting_Gold.description: A large painting on canvas with a golden frame.
Painting_Gold.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Gold_Wood.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a gold leaf frame.
Painting_Gold_Wood.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Meta_WildTea_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Gorse Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Gold_Ore_Stack_100.description: Gold ore returned from the depths of Icarus.
Gold_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: In the future, Icarus\'s natural wealth offers many intriguing possibilities.

Scorpion_Boss_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Giant Scorpion.
Scorpion_Boss_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Attachment_Armor.description: An attachment that grants a chance to return damage to the attacker.
Scorpion_Attachment_Armor.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest, arms or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Smoked_Gamey_Meat.flavorText: Smokey and gamey, with a distinctive taste.

Glass_Bottle.flavorText: Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.

Food_Trough_Glass.description: A Glass feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Glass.flavorText: A feeder with a little bit of class.

Dog_Head_A1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_A1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_B1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_B1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_A1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_B1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Cat_Head_A1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Cat_Head_A1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cat_Trophy_A1.description: A preserved memory of your feline friend.

Mission_Kiwi_Egg.description: A Kiwi egg that has been genetically modified to withstand the harsh Icarus environment.
Mission_Kiwi_Egg.flavorText: I wonder if these would taste good?

Scorpion_Module.description: A proportion of melee damage will be returned when hit.
Scorpion_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Giant Scorpion Creature.

Ape_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Ape_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Ape_Hide.description: A piece of hide taken from the body of a great beast.

Ape_Bicep.description: A piece of tendon taken from the body of a great beast.

Ape_Trophy.description: A preserved specimen from a Garganutan that once lived on Icarus.
Ape_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Rug.description: A rug crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Rug.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Ape_Fishing_Trap.description: A fishing trap crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Fishing_Trap.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Ape_Armor_Head.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Head.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Chest.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Chest.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Arms.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Arms.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Legs.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Legs.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Armor_Feet.description: Armor crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.
Ape_Armor_Feet.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ape_Attractor.description: A device which when powered will draw creatures to its location. Less effective if there are other attractors present already.
Ape_Attractor.flavorText: The opposite of a Creature Deterrent.

Ape_Tonic.description: A tonic that sends one into a frenzy ready to engage in fist to fist combat.

Ape_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Garganutan creature.

Ape_Attachment.description: An attachment which increases melee damage and has a blunt force trauma chance.
Ape_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ape_Grenade.description: A high-tech sonic grenade which causes creatures to become frenzied and attack each other.
Ape_Grenade.flavorText: A grenade crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.

Guano.description: Excrement of some bat-like creatures in Icarus, very rich in Nitrogen and Phosphorus.
Guano.flavorText: Surely there is a use for this.

Milk_Glass_Bottle.description: A glass bottle made for storing milk. Milk will not spoil.
Milk_Glass_Bottle.flavorText: Milk was considered \'food of the gods\' in ancient cultures.

Juvenile_Ape_Trophy.flavorText: Not the greatest ape, but a menacing decoration.

Juvenile_Ape_Head.description: A preserved memory of a beast.
Juvenile_Ape_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Slug_Head.description: A preserved memory of a genetically spliced creature.
Snow_Slug_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Faction_Mission_DownLaser.description: A high intensity strontium vapor laser prototype.
Faction_Mission_DownLaser.flavorText: Exactly why Group 15 had experimental weapons grade laser equipment lying around is anyone\'s guess.

Snow_Slug_Trophy.description: A mounted genetically spliced Viscid head.
Snow_Slug_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mission_DNA_TissueSample.description: A Tissue Sample Expertly removed with a Scalpel.
